title: Villager Cleric House
description: Adds a Villager Cleric House to the plains biome
body:
### Villager Cleric House
**This mod adds a Villager Cleric House to the game, featuring Cleric villagers living and working inside the new house.**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5dc90d493db341ed7f1d927ee24ce01159d520b.jpeg)

You’ll also find brewing themed loot throughout the structure, along with a small hidden room tucked inside.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31dd1dd0b2fa5bdf61a186cef6d7f6a7e30303d3.jpeg)


The Villager Cleric House can spawn in the Plains and Sunflower Plains biomes.


![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58b39663b911c8de8bcaea606afb211b3c6e9f25.jpeg)


Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
